scripts.loyal-smart-accounts:build: bun run --cwd sdk/loyal-smart-accounts-core build && bun run --cwd sdk/loyal-smart-accounts build
scripts.loyal-smart-accounts:typecheck: bun run guard:sdk-dist-untracked && bun run --cwd sdk/loyal-smart-accounts-core build && bun run --cwd sdk/loyal-smart-accounts-core typecheck && bun run --cwd sdk/loyal-smart-accounts build && bun run --cwd sdk/loyal-smart-accounts typecheck
scripts.loyal-smart-accounts:test: bun run guard:sdk-dist-untracked && bun run --cwd sdk/loyal-smart-accounts-core build && bun run --cwd sdk/loyal-smart-accounts build && bun run --cwd sdk/loyal-smart-accounts-core test && bun run --cwd sdk/loyal-smart-accounts test
scripts.build:grid-packages: bun run --cwd packages/grid-core build && bun run --cwd packages/auth-core build
scripts.typecheck:grid-packages: bun run --cwd packages/grid-core typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/auth-core typecheck
scripts.build:solana-packages: bun run --cwd packages/solana-rpc build && bun run --cwd packages/solana-wallet build
scripts.typecheck:solana-packages: bun run --cwd packages/solana-rpc typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/solana-wallet typecheck
scripts.commitlint:head: commitlint --from HEAD~1 --to HEAD --verbose
scripts.build:db-packages: bun run --cwd packages/db-core build && bun run --cwd packages/db-adapter-neon build
scripts.build:llm-packages: bun run --cwd packages/llm-core build && bun run --cwd packages/llm-server build
scripts.typecheck:db-packages: bun run --cwd packages/db-core typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/db-adapter-neon typecheck
scripts.typecheck:llm-packages: bun run --cwd packages/llm-core typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/llm-server typecheck
scripts.guard:shared-boundaries: rg -n "@/lib/core/config/server|app/src/lib/core/config/server" packages && (echo "Shared packages must not import app server config" && exit 1) || true
scripts.guard:llm-package-boundaries: rg -n "@/|@/lib/core/config/server|app/src/lib/core/config/server" packages/llm-core packages/llm-server && (echo "LLM packages must not import app aliases or server config" && exit 1) || true
scripts.guard:admin-shared-schema: ([ ! -d admin/src/lib/generated ] || (echo "admin/src/lib/generated must not exist" && exit 1)) && ([ ! -f admin/drizzle.config.ts ] || (echo "admin/drizzle.config.ts must not exist" && exit 1)) && (rg -n "@/lib/generated|src/lib/generated" admin/src && (echo "Admin must use shared @loyal-labs/db-core/schema only" && exit 1) || true)
scripts.guard:sdk-dist-untracked: test -z "$(git ls-files 'sdk/loyal-smart-accounts/dist/**' 'sdk/loyal-smart-accounts-core/dist/**')" || (echo 'SDK dist outputs must not be tracked' && exit 1)
